X.essay: Strong Free/Pro PRD grounded in Indonesian payment reality (QRIS/VA/e-wallet), school-year pricing, and concrete code seams. Edge-case tables and acceptance criteria are thorough. Slightly weaker on scope realism: trial, many gated surfaces, and phase-2 features in the matrix make MVP feel heavier than necessary.

Y.essay: Excellent product-fit PRD: clear teacher pain (AI/PDF cost, useful Free trial shape), additive architecture, and a tight Free/Pro matrix. Edge cases cover quota reservation/release, async jobs, grace/past_due, abuse, and DEV_AUTH. Acceptance stories and MVP-done scenarios are testable. Scope is ambitious but better constrained than a kitchen-sink monetize rewrite.
